metrics.label: Recall@5
metrics.hint: Top-5 contained a usable doc in 48/50

roadmap.title: Day 0 — Discovery & data review
roadmap.desc: Pull 1 month of search logs; agree on the 50-question gold test set with the merchandising team.

roadmap.title: Day 1–15 — Index hardening
roadmap.desc: Add filter fields (category, price band, size), backfill descriptions, enable integrated vectorization.

roadmap.title: Day 16–30 — Hybrid + semantic enabled in prod
roadmap.desc: Roll out hybrid + semantic ranker to 10% of traffic. Compare CTR and zero-result rate against legacy keyword.

roadmap.title: Day 31–60 — RAG chat in soft launch
roadmap.desc: Ship the grounded chat to a beta audience of 5% loyalty members. Capture every turn for the eval set.

roadmap.title: Day 61–90 — Pilot to GA
roadmap.desc: Full rollout behind a feature flag. Wire Application Insights + Foundry evaluations into CI/CD.
